downscale_filter_note: Pixel-art requires hard-pixel downscaling. Do NOT use LANCZOS or bicubic — it smears the 1-pixel edges characteristic of the style.

blockout_phase.note: One mid-stride pose per direction. Future character_animation workflow expands to 3 frames per direction (12 total) using middle-frame = idle convention.

future_animation_targets.note: 3-frame walk pattern: middle / left-foot / middle / right-foot. Middle frame doubles as idle pose — no separate idle anim in the classic RPG Maker convention.

future_full_budget.note: 4 dir × 3 frames = 12. Tiny compared to ARPG-scale top_down_character's 137.
